'''鈭歜-th-d''' ('''kabathad''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:unbitch|unbitch]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| b-th-d
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:unbitch|unbitch]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歜-th-d
|-
! Lemma
| kabathad
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thibathad|thibathad]] || [[word:jibathad|jibathad]] || [[word:shibathad|shibathad]] || [[word:kibathad|kibathad]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthubathad|thuthubathad]] || [[word:jujubathad|jujubathad]] || [[word:shushubathad|shushubathad]] || [[word:kukubathad|kukubathad]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thubathad|thubathad]] || [[word:jubathad|jubathad]] || [[word:shubathad|shubathad]] || [[word:kubathad|kubathad]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thubathad|thubathad]] || [[word:jubathad|jubathad]] || [[word:shubathad|shubathad]] || [[word:kubathad|kubathad]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thebathad|thebathad]] || [[word:jebathad|jebathad]] || [[word:shebathad|shebathad]] || [[word:kebathad|kebathad]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothobathad|thothobathad]] || [[word:jojobathad|jojobathad]] || [[word:shoshobathad|shoshobathad]] || [[word:kokobathad|kokobathad]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thobathad|thobathad]] || [[word:jobathad|jobathad]] || [[word:shobathad|shobathad]] || [[word:kobathad|kobathad]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thobathad|thobathad]] || [[word:jobathad|jobathad]] || [[word:shobathad|shobathad]] || [[word:kobathad|kobathad]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙bathad|th忙bathad]] || [[word:j忙bathad|j忙bathad]] || [[word:sh忙bathad|sh忙bathad]] || [[word:k忙bathad|k忙bathad]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathabathad|thathabathad]] || [[word:jajabathad|jajabathad]] || [[word:shashabathad|shashabathad]] || [[word:kakabathad|kakabathad]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thabathad|thabathad]] || [[word:jabathad|jabathad]] || [[word:shabathad|shabathad]] || [[word:kabathad|kabathad]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thabathad|thabathad]] || [[word:jabathad|jabathad]] || [[word:shabathad|shabathad]] || [[word:kabathad|kabathad]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shabathad|shabathad]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshabathad|goshabathad]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishabathad|gokishabathad]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shabathadn眉|shabathadn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshabathadnkn眉|goshabathadnkn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishabathadn眉|gokishabathadn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shabathadsh毛|shabathadsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshabathadnksh毛|goshabathadnksh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishabathadsh毛|gokishabathadsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shabathadro|shabathadro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshabathadnkro|goshabathadnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishabathadro|gokishabathadro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shabathadmu|shabathadmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshabathadnkmu|goshabathadnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishabathadmu|gokishabathadmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shabathadsher|shabathadsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshabathadnksher|goshabathadnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishabathadsher|gokishabathadsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shabathadng|shabathadng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshabathadnkng|goshabathadnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishabathadng|gokishabathadng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shabathadya|shabathadya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshabathadnkya|goshabathadnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishabathadya|gokishabathadya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shabathadyam|shabathadyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshabathadnkyam|goshabathadnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishabathadyam|gokishabathadyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shabathadn眉sh毛|shabathadn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshabathadnkn眉sh毛|goshabathadnkn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishabathadn眉sh毛|gokishabathadn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shabathadn眉ro|shabathadn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshabathadnkn眉ro|goshabathadnkn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishabathadn眉ro|gokishabathadn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shabathadn眉mu|shabathadn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshabathadnkn眉mu|goshabathadnkn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishabathadn眉mu|gokishabathadn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shabathadsh毛n眉|shabathadsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshabathadnksh毛n眉|goshabathadnksh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishabathadsh毛n眉|gokishabathadsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shabathadsh毛ro|shabathadsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshabathadnksh毛ro|goshabathadnksh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishabathadsh毛ro|gokishabathadsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shabathadsh毛mu|shabathadsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshabathadnksh毛mu|goshabathadnksh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishabathadsh毛mu|gokishabathadsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shabathadron眉|shabathadron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshabathadnkron眉|goshabathadnkron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishabathadron眉|gokishabathadron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shabathadrosh毛|shabathadrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshabathadnkrosh毛|goshabathadnkrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishabathadrosh毛|gokishabathadrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shabathadromu|shabathadromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshabathadnkromu|goshabathadnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishabathadromu|gokishabathadromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shabathadmun眉|shabathadmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshabathadnkmun眉|goshabathadnkmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishabathadmun眉|gokishabathadmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shabathadmush毛|shabathadmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshabathadnkmush毛|goshabathadnkmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishabathadmush毛|gokishabathadmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shabathadmuro|shabathadmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshabathadnkmuro|goshabathadnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishabathadmuro|gokishabathadmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|46bbfe2}}
